purpose: Top-level KPIs and MoM trends for leadership. Covers the full pipeline from upload to publish with 10 headline KPIs.
sample_questions: How many videos were uploaded this month?
What is the overall publish rate?
What is the Content Expansion Factor?
How many active users do we have?
What is the Editorial Yield percentage?
What is the Orphan Content Rate?
Show monthly upload trend
What is MoM upload momentum?

purpose: Time-based analysis of KPIs over the 12-month period. Covers efficiency trends, CEF over time, duration footprint, and data quality.
sample_questions: Show monthly publish rate trend
What is the drop-off count each month?
Which input type has the highest CEF?
What is the monthly productivity index?
Show the duration footprint over time
What is the metadata health score?
Which output type generates most clips per upload?
Show content expansion factor over 12 months

purpose: Breakdown of KPIs by channel, user, and language. Covers user loyalty, platform dominance, and per-user productivity.
sample_questions: What is the active user ratio?
Which channel publishes the most?
What is the user repeatability rate?
Show user loyalty tier breakdown
Which language has the highest upload share?
What is the top 10% user contribution?
Show avg uploads per user
Which platform dominates publishing?

purpose: Deep funnel analysis with advanced diversity metrics. Covers CEI, wastage, Simpson's diversity, Gini coefficient, PDI, latency, and consistency.
sample_questions: What is the Content Efficiency Index?
What is the wastage rate?
What is the duration amplification ratio?
What is the Mix Health Index?
What is the Platform Diversity Index?
What is the Channel Gini Coefficient?
Show publishing latency by input type
What is the consistency index?
Show the full publishing funnel

purpose: Video-level detail explorer with search, filter, and drill-down. KPIs update dynamically based on applied filters.
sample_questions: How many videos are in the current view?
What is the publish percentage for this filter?
How many unique users are in the current selection?
What is the type share breakdown?
Which team has the highest publish percentage?
Show top user in current filter
How many platforms are covered in this view?
